title:
Family-owned farms account for 96% of U.S. farms, according to the
Census of Agriculture Typology Report
summary: Family farms comprise 96% of all U.S. farms, account for 87% of land in farms, and 82% of the value of all agricultural products sold, according to the 2017 Census of Agriculture Farm Typology report released today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National
